title: 🔧 Diagnose Centrifugal Pump - Case 1
desc: Evaluate Centrifugal Pump telemetry anomalies against ISO-10816 standards.
content: Check the status of Centrifugal Pump [Equipment Tag] in plant sector [Sector Name]. We are observing high casing vibration exceeding [Vibration Threshold] mm/s. Cross-reference this behavior with ISO-10816 vibration guidelines and provide a detailed diagnostic check, intermediate operating limits, and recommend if lockout/tagout (LOTO) isolation tag [LOTO Tag] is required.

title: 🔧 Diagnose Hydraulic Press - Case 2
desc: Evaluate Hydraulic Press telemetry anomalies against API-610 standards.
content: Check the status of Hydraulic Press [Equipment Tag] in plant sector [Sector Name]. We are observing outlet pressure dropping below [Pressure Threshold] PSI under full load. Cross-reference this behavior with API-610 safety limits for pumps and provide a detailed diagnostic check, intermediate operating limits, and recommend if lockout/tagout (LOTO) isolation tag [LOTO Tag] is required.

title: 🔧 Diagnose Belt Conveyor - Case 3
desc: Evaluate Belt Conveyor telemetry anomalies against Plant standards.
content: Check the status of Belt Conveyor [Equipment Tag] in plant sector [Sector Name]. We are observing casing temperature rising to [Temp Threshold]°C with cooling valves fully open. Cross-reference this behavior with Plant SOP Handover standard [SOP Version] and provide a detailed diagnostic check, intermediate operating limits, and recommend if lockout/tagout (LOTO) isolation tag [LOTO Tag] is required.

title: 🔧 Diagnose Steam Turbine - Case 4
